# 727a8.com

> Free guide to the Chapter 7 discharge bar under 11 U.S.C. Section 727(a)(8).

727a8.com is a free, open-source educational resource about the 8-year Chapter 7 discharge waiting period. Part of the Bankruptcy Transparency Network.

## Pages

- https://727a8.com/: Complete guide to the 8-year Chapter 7 discharge bar
- https://727a8.com/calculator.html: Free calculator -- when can you file Chapter 7 again
- https://727a8.com/case-law.html: Key case law interpreting Section 727(a)(8)
- https://727a8.com/vs-1328f.html: 727(a)(8) vs 1328(f) -- comparing Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 discharge bars
- https://727a8.com/727a9.html: Section 727(a)(9) -- the 6-year bar after a Chapter 13 discharge

## Contact

This site is maintained by volunteers. No legal advice is provided.
